arts.ttl: 12-goal Premier League star prefers a move to Arsenal over Man United
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly leading the race to sign Ipswich Town striker Liam Delap, with the 22-year-old favoring a move to the Emirates over Manchester United, according to Daily Star. Delap, who has netted 12 goals in 31 Premier League appearances this season, is expected to leave Ipswich following their possible relegation. arts.ttl: 13 players to miss Arsenal vs Real Madrid Champions League clash as latest update given
arts.sum: Arsenal will look to complete the job and make it through to the final four in the Champions League on Wednesday night when they take on Real Madrid at the Bernabeu in the second leg of their quarter-final tie Arteta has confirmed that midfielder Jorginho hasn’t travelled with the squad after suffering what looked like a rib injury in the draw against Brentford.

arts.ttl: From PSG to Arsenal -- and Chelsea? The best 25 European teams right now
arts.sum: That feels like a millennium ago, but the single soccer season that has played out in that time has offered us countless plot twists, from Paris Saint-Germain's disappointing Champions League start, to Manchester City's early-season collapse, to Liverpool's winter dominance, to PSG's spring surge and so on. Below are the top 15 teams in what I'm calling "adjusted goal differential" in all competitions since Feb. 16, exactly two months ago.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid sources believe player will join Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly not actively working on a deal to sign Martin Zubimendi, and seem to believe he’ll end up at Arsenal. The Real Sociedad midfielder has shone in La Liga and will surely be snapped up by a bigger club before too long.
